title: Sony AI table tennis robot outplays elite human players
title_zh: Sony AI table tennis robot outplays elite human players
abstract: Ace rotates its paddle as it prepares to return the ball back to its human opponent, Yamato Kawamata, during a match in December 2025. Credit: Sony AI. In an article published today in Nature, Sony AI introduce Ace, the first robot to beat elite human players in competitive physical sport. Although AI systems have shown […]
